ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of The Bank Account
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clyde Long for Helen Pisevich.

Mr. Long stated that he filed the e-mail verification through E-filing on Friday, that it is not possible to create a bank account for someone without their participation or social security number, that they are back to their original request to place the funds in a blocked account, and suggested splitting the accounts between Citi Bank and Bank of America. The Court will sign an order approving the funds being deposited into blocked accounts. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts was set for September 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Further Instructing Co-Trustees Re Distribution Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Herman Long for and with Helen Piscevich (Petitioner/Trustee).

Mr. Long explained that he was requesting that the funds be placed into a blocked account out of concern about the funds being escheated to the State if the account becomes inactive, that he electronically filed a supplement to the Petition, that Citibank is a National Bank and available across the Country, that Sanja Kabalin does not pick up the checks, and that he does not know what her medical or mental status is. Mr. Long also explained that the petition was not signed by Tin deGuy because Mr. deGuy is Croatia, that the amendment to the Trust (second to the last page in Exhibit A to the petition) states that the "If, for any reason, only a single Successor Trustee is available to serve as Trustee, that Trustee may either serve alone as Trustee, or appoint a Co-Trustee." and provided a copy of an e-mail verification signed by Mr. deGuy. The Court instructed Mr. Long to file the verification. The Court waives notice and accepts Mr. Long's explanation regarding Mr. deGuy not signing the petition. Furthermore, Mr. Long stated that he will also be depositing $150,000.00 into Wells Fargo Bank in Lafayette to remain within the federally insured amount. The Court directed Mr. Long to deposit the funds but not into blocked accounts. The Court granted the Petition for Order Instructing Co-Trustee Re Distribution of Trust Assets (subject to review of the order). The Court also instructed Counsel to provide written notice to Sanja, to Sanja's Father and Sister, and to file a declaration regarding the Trustee's and Counsel's efforts in trying to contact Sanja. Proof of the bank account was set for August 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
